backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the e-commerce backend with CRUD operations for products, cart management, orders, and user profiles, with role-based access control restricting admin operations to authorized users.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three admin product management features (create, edit/delete, and CRUD hooks) to their associated source files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries for all frontend source files, describing each component, page, hook, and style file in the e-commerce React app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app, including sidebar, chart, and semantic UI tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'E-Commerce Website' and mounting the app at the #root div via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (home, products, cart, checkout, orders, and admin/products) wrapped in ThemeProvider and a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AdminProductForm: React Hook Form-based form component for creating and editing products, handling field validation, price conversion to cents, and constructing a typed Product object before calling the parent onSubmit callback.
frontend/src/components/CartItemRow.tsx: Cart item row component displaying product initials, name, unit price, an editable quantity selector, line total, and a remove button wired to backend mutation hooks with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmDialog.ts: A reusable confirmation dialog component built on AlertDialog that supports customizable title, description, button text, and a destructive styling mode.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedCategori: Displays a grid of 8 hardcoded product categories with icons and colors, each linking to the products page filtered by that category.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProducts: Fetches and displays the first 8 products in a responsive grid with loading skeletons and an empty state fallback.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, navigation links for shop categories and account pages, and a caffeine.ai attribution line.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-width hero banner with a background image, gradient overlay, headline text, and two call-to-action buttons linking to the products page.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading spinner during sign-in and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with a logo, desktop search form, cart badge, order history link, admin product management link, and a mobile menu toggle.
frontend/src/components/OrderHistoryItem: Displays a single order as a collapsible card showing order ID, date, total, and an expandable itemized list of purchased products.
frontend/src/components/OrderSummary.tsx: Renders a styled order summary card listing cart items with quantities and prices, plus a total at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a single product in either grid or list view with image, price, stock badge, star rating, and an 'Add to Cart' button that requires authentication.
frontend/src/components/ProductFilters.t: Provides a filter/sort toolbar for the product listing with category pill buttons, a sort dropdown, and a grid/list view toggle.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name and saves the profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/QuantitySelector: A controlled numeric input with increment/decrement buttons for selecting a quantity within a configurable min/max range.
frontend/src/components/ShippingForm.tsx: A react-hook-form-based form collecting full name, address, city, and postal code, with validation errors and a submit button that shows a loading state.
frontend/src/components/StarRating.tsx: Displays a row of star icons filled up to the given rating value, supporting small and medium size variants.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) via React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context provider and hook using @dfinity/auth-client, exposing login, logout, identity, and login-status state to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including products (CRUD, search), cart management, orders, admin role checks, and user profiles, using the actor and Internet Identity hooks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm neutral/amber color palette in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminProductsPage.tsx: Admin-only page for managing products with a table view supporting add, edit, and delete operations, with access control based on authentication and admin role checks.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items with quantities and an order summary, requiring authentication and handling empty/loading states.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page that renders a shipping form alongside an order summary, places the order via mutation, and redirects to the confirmation page on success.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page composing the hero section, featured categories, and featured products, and conditionally showing a profile setup modal for newly authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Static confirmation page displayed after a successful order, showing the order ID and links to order history and the products page.
frontend/src/pages/OrderHistoryPage.tsx: Displays a user's past orders in reverse chronological order, showing a sign-in prompt for unauthenticated users and an empty state for users with no orders.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Shows full details for a single product (image, description, price, stock, rating) with a quantity selector and add-to-cart functionality, requiring authentication to add items.
frontend/src/pages/ProductListingPage.ts: Renders a filterable, sortable product grid/list with category and sort controls, supporting search query and category URL params to pre-filter results.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (including hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom design tokens (colors via OKLCH variables, fonts, border radii, shadows, animations) and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state including version, architectural notes, and a list of implemented features for the e-commerce website build.
